nodes.norm_label: content viewing extras (download, ocr region, transcript, history)

nodes.label: Signup / login by email OR username
nodes.norm_label: signup / login by email or username

nodes.label: GAME mode (per-question timer, speed points, streaks)
nodes.norm_label: game mode (per-question timer, speed points, streaks)

nodes.label: Subscriptions / plans (manual activation)
nodes.rationale: No payment integration — an admin manually activates orgs and sets seat limits; approving a tutor request mints an ACTIVE subscription (SubscriptionSource ADMIN).

nodes.label: Multi-tenant isolation
nodes.rationale: Every content/assessment query is scoped centrally by role + ACTIVE membership; a deactivated learner loses content access immediately on the existing session (not at JWT expiry).

nodes.label: Usage-limit UX & subscription promotion modal
nodes.rationale: A single app-wide promotion modal surfaces consistently whenever a self-serve usage limit is hit, instead of each call site failing silently or with ad-hoc text; the hard 120 MB cap (FILE_TOO_LARGE) and tenant-owner / already-top-plan limits show an inline message because upgrading would not lift them.

nodes.label: contentAccess.service.ts isolation guard (assertCanAccessContent)
nodes.rationale: Central guard (resolveTenantIdForUser, buildContentListWhere, assertCanAccessContent, assertCanMutateContent, assertTenantOwnsContent) keying on a ContentAssignment for this learner plus active membership — same-tenant-unassigned and cross-boundary both 404 with no existence leak.

nodes.label: classifyLimitError / useLimitErrorHandler decision logic
nodes.rationale: Chooses modal vs inline message by role + upgradePlanCode: self-serve INDIVIDUAL quota/plan-file limit → global modal; tenant-owner, already-top-plan, hard 120 MB cap, inactive subs, learner blocks → inline localized message.

nodes.label: Quota error contract (402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED / 413 PLAN_FILE_LIMIT / 413 FILE_TOO_LARGE)
nodes.rationale: Quota-gated actions return 402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED {feature,used,limit,upgradePlanCode}; per-file plan caps return 413 PLAN_FILE_LIMIT; the hard upload cap returns 413 FILE_TOO_LARGE which no upgrade lifts.
nodes.norm_label: quota error contract (402 quota_exceeded / 413 plan_file_limit / 413 file_too_large)

nodes.label: Role-aware upgradePlanCode
nodes.rationale: FREE individual → INDIVIDUAL_PRO, STARTER tenant → TENANT_GROWTH, top plan → null (no self-serve upgrade offered).

nodes.label: Barrel-split module pattern
nodes.rationale: Larger backend modules live as folders re-exported through a barrel at the original path (e.g. assessment.service.ts re-exports assessment/*), so imports stay stable.

nodes.label: Hard upload cap UPLOAD_MAX_MB = 120
nodes.rationale: Hard 120 MB upload cap kept in sync with nginx client_max_body_size 120m; oversized upload returns 413 FILE_TOO_LARGE.

nodes.label: API Routes Mounted at Root (no /api prefix)
nodes.norm_label: api routes mounted at root (no /api prefix)

nodes.label: Multi-tenant isolation (contentAccess.service.ts / assertCanAccessContent)
nodes.rationale: Enforced centrally in contentAccess.service.ts (assertCanAccessContent / buildContentListWhere). The learner guard returns content only via an explicit ContentAssignment plus an active TenantMembership, so same-tenant-unassigned and cross-boundary (tenantId=null B2C) crafted IDs both return 404 with no existence leak. Deactivation revokes access immediately on the existing token, not at JWT expiry. Verified live as a 40-check matrix with 0 leaks.

nodes.label: i18n / Uzbek-first localization (next-intl, no English/Uzbek leaks)
nodes.rationale: Uzbek-first audience. ICU in V8/Node ships no Uzbek RelativeTimeFormat data and thin PluralRules/DateTimeFormat data, so any uz Intl-based formatting must be hand-checked (F18 manually formats Uzbek relative time). Count strings use ICU plural for ru (one/few/many/other) and en (one/other); uz nouns left invariant after numerals.
nodes.norm_label: i18n / uzbek-first localization (next-intl, no english/uzbek leaks)

nodes.label: Accessibility — focus management / focus-trap / ARIA / contrast
nodes.norm_label: accessibility — focus management / focus-trap / aria / contrast

nodes.label: Quota / usage limits → promotion modal (402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED / 413)
nodes.rationale: Every quota-gated 402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED (UPLOAD/GENERATION/PODCAST/VIDEO/TUTOR_MESSAGE) or 413 PLAN_FILE_LIMIT opens one global promotion modal for self-serve INDIVIDUALs; the hard 120 MB FILE_TOO_LARGE cap and tenant-owner/already-Pro cases show inline text instead (upgrading wouldn't lift them). Routed via classifyLimitError + role-aware useLimitErrorHandler + useUpgradeModal.
nodes.norm_label: quota / usage limits → promotion modal (402 quota_exceeded / 413)

nodes.label: Assessment publish / assign flow (DRAFT vs PUBLISHED, attempts, results)
nodes.rationale: A DRAFT assessment is filtered out of the learner's PUBLISHED-only list and 404s on submit, so assigning a DRAFT must be blocked (400) to avoid a dead assignment with no signal (F56). Banks build → AI-generate DRAFT questions → approve/reject; assessments compose → publish → assign → review.
nodes.norm_label: assessment publish / assign flow (draft vs published, attempts, results)

nodes.label: Slide-deck generation + DeckPlayer (per-locale decks, regenerate)
nodes.rationale: Generated decks are per-locale/per-audience scoped (uz shows the generate-empty-state when the deck was made in en — by design, like podcast/video). createSlides short-circuits to a cached READY deck, so Regenerate needs an explicit regenerate flag to bypass the cache (F60). DeckPlayer carousel needs keyboard arrow/Home/End nav, aria-live slide announcements, and a focus-visible ring (F57).

nodes.label: Quiz generation status (no Quiz.status field → spin-forever risk)
nodes.rationale: The Quiz model has no status column, so a 0-question or failed generateQuiz job has nowhere to persist FAILED; useQuiz polls until questions.length (never on failure) and the card spins forever. Interim no-migration fix is a self-correcting staleness check (isQuizGenerationStale: 0 questions older than the 120s window → failed state). A persisted Quiz.status written READY/FAILED by the job is the robust fix but needs a migration (deferred).
nodes.norm_label: quiz generation status (no quiz.status field → spin-forever risk)

nodes.label: Stateless-JWT staleness (no tokenVersion on role/password change)
nodes.rationale: Tokens are stateless 7-day JWTs with no tokenVersion/denylist. A role change (admin tutor approval, F45/F11) leaves the old JWT encoding INDIVIDUAL so every /tenant/* call 403s until re-login; a password change or logout (F46) does not invalidate existing tokens (a leaked token survives a reset for its full lifetime). One structural fix — User.tokenVersion embedded in the JWT, bumped on password/role change and rejected when stale in authMiddleware — covers all three, but it touches the auth hot path and needs perf review, so it is deferred for human review, not auto-applied.
nodes.norm_label: stateless-jwt staleness (no tokenversion on role/password change)

nodes.label: SSE job-events stream (GET /events) replacing completion polling
nodes.rationale: Replaced 8 react-query refetchInterval polls with one per-tab SSE stream pushing id-only job-completion events that drive invalidateQueries; polling demoted to a 30s safety-net. Per-user scoped (S1: user A's event never reaches B), defence-in-depth (events carry no content, the refetch re-runs assertCanAccessContent), job decoupled from delivery (dead-socket errors swallowed), and a FAILED push fixes the prior poll-forever-on-failure symptom.
nodes.norm_label: sse job-events stream (get /events) replacing completion polling

nodes.label: Seat-limit / join-code enrolment boundary (assertTenantQuota STUDENT)
nodes.rationale: Both enrol paths (/auth/register+joinCode and /auth/join-class) route through joinTenantByCode → assertTenantQuota('STUDENT'); a seat-full class returns 402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED with no over-enrol. QuotaFeature gained a STUDENT member so the message reads 'Seat limit reached' not 'Upload limit reached' (F26). Register creating the user before joinTenantByCode leaves an orphaned INDIVIDUAL account on a failed join (F27/F43).

nodes.label: F59 (S2, fixed): quiz generation returning 0 questions / failing spun forever — no FAILED state
nodes.rationale: Fixed without a schema migration via a self-correcting staleness check (isQuizGenerationStale). The robust persisted-status fix (a Quiz.status column written READY/FAILED by the job) was deliberately deferred for human review because schema migrations on this drift-prone dev DB are the highest-risk autonomous change — a botched migration could wedge the environment with no one present to recover. The staleness fix resolves the user-facing infinite-spinner symptom safely in the meantime.
nodes.norm_label: f59 (s2, fixed): quiz generation returning 0 questions / failing spun forever — no failed state

nodes.label: F60 (S3, fixed): slide-deck 'Regenerate' was a silent no-op once a deck existed (cache short-circuit)
nodes.rationale: Added a regenerate flag that skips the createSlides cache short-circuit. The audience-aware cache-key part — @@unique([contentId,locale,scopeKey]) lacks audience and there is no audience selector in the UI — is a separate migration-bearing enhancement and was deferred.
nodes.norm_label: f60 (s3, fixed): slide-deck 'regenerate' was a silent no-op once a deck existed (cache short-circuit)
